meta.title: Simian Foamy Virus Pseudotypes of Vesicular Stomatitis Virus: Production and Use in Sero-epidemiological Investigations

abstractHtml: Simian foamy virus (SFV) pseudotypes of vesicular stomatitis virus have been successfully produced and their host range characterized. The availability of these pseudotypes has permitted the development of a rapid, quantitative assay to measure neutralizing antibody titres to SFV that has proved useful in a sero-epidemiological study.
